architecture_summary: Add GitHubAppTokenExchange as a pure receipt planner that builds the GitHub App installation-token endpoint and request payload, hashes the payload, classifies plan_only, dry_run, and exchange_approved modes, and emits GitHubAppTokenExchangeReceipt without loading a private key, creating a JWT, calling GitHub, or storing a raw token. Plan-only and dry-run receipts cannot bind response evidence. Exchange-approved receipts only admit the external token exchange when approval, external execution receipt, 2xx response status, token fingerprint, token expiry, and response payload hash are present. Raw token, JWT, or private-key shaped material blocks admission before any token exchange claim can be recorded. The receipt schema is indexed in the governance protocol manifest so public schema validation can witness the boundary.
data_model_changes: add GitHubAppTokenExchangeRequest for repository, app id, installation id, private-key fingerprint, requested permissions, TTL, mode, evidence refs, approval refs, external execution refs, token fingerprint, expiry, response refs, and metadata

add GitHubAppTokenExchangeReceipt for endpoint, request payload, payload hash, private-key fingerprint, token TTL, blocked reasons, required controls, external token exchange admission, and non-live execution flags

add schema-backed receipt metadata proving terminal closure is separate, GitHub API was not called, private key was not loaded, JWT was not created, raw token was not stored, payload hash is bound, and secret absence was verified
rollback_plan: Remove GitHubAppTokenExchange, its receipt schema, protocol manifest entry, protocol document count update, focused tests, proof coverage matrix surface and generated fixture/doc changes, and SDLC evidence artifacts, then rerun schema validation, protocol manifest validation, public repository surface validation, proof coverage matrix validation, focused token-exchange tests, SDLC artifact validation, security review validation, release readiness validation, and workspace governance preflight.
migration_plan: No persistence, credential, deployment, GitHub App, branch protection, check-run, or runtime route migration is required. The change adds a local deterministic planner and schema only.
